title: chore(deps): bump @hono/node-server from 1.19.8 to 1.19.10 in /examples/inngest

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): bump @hono/node-server from 1.19.9 to 1.19.10 in /scripts/gh-issue-triage
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relevance: Same dependency bump to 1.19.10 for a different directory, already merged

summary: Dependabot patch bump of @hono/node-server from 1.19.8 to 1.19.10 in examples/inngest. This includes a security fix (GHSA-wc8c-qw6v-h7f6) for an authorization bypass in Serve Static Middleware caused by inconsistent URL decoding (%2F handling), plus a bug fix to stop overwriting global.fetch. Only changes one line in examples/inngest/package.json.
maintainerNotes: This is a security-related dependency bump. The 1.19.10 release fixes an authorization bypass vulnerability in Serve Static Middleware. A similar PR (#13816) bumping the same dependency in /scripts/gh-issue-triage was already merged. CI shows 'Full Test Suite' as failed but all individual checks passed or were skipped — the failure appears unrelated to this change (examples are outside the main test scope). The merge state is BLOCKED only because review approval is required. Safe to merge.
